new_findings.pattern: I seem to be facing an unusual issue
new_findings.rationale: This specific phrasing is overly formal and does not appear in real samples.

new_findings.pattern: I was curious about whether you guys offer any discounts
new_findings.rationale: The informal 'you guys' and the structure of the inquiry are not found in real samples.

new_findings.pattern: I thought I had cancelled my subscription
new_findings.rationale: This phrasing suggests a level of uncertainty that is not present in real samples.

new_findings.pattern: I received the wrong item and I honestly just want my money back
new_findings.rationale: The combination of 'honestly just want' is a unique expression not seen in real samples.
